scripts.db:migrate: npm run build && sequelize-cli --config dist/sequelize.config.js --models-path dist/Persistence/Models --migrations-path dist/Persistence/Migrations --seeders-path dist/Persistence/Seeders db:migrate
scripts.db:migrate:undo: npm run build && sequelize-cli --config dist/sequelize.config.js --models-path dist/Persistence/Models --migrations-path dist/Persistence/Migrations --seeders-path dist/Persistence/Seeders db:migrate:undo
scripts.db:seed: npm run build && sequelize-cli --config dist/sequelize.config.js --models-path dist/Persistence/Models --migrations-path dist/Persistence/Migrations --seeders-path dist/Persistence/Seeders db:seed:all
scripts.db:seed:undo: npm run build && sequelize-cli --config dist/sequelize.config.js --models-path dist/Persistence/Models --migrations-path dist/Persistence/Migrations --seeders-path dist/Persistence/Seeders db:seed:undo:all
